---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact — Bingjin Xue"
---

## Email

[bingjin.xue@unh.edu](mailto:bingjin.xue@unh.edu) — best way to reach me.

## Office

Office 321\
Peter T. Paul College of Business and Economics\
University of New Hampshire\
10 Garrison Avenue\
Durham, NH 03824

## Elsewhere
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/xuebingjin/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=GjuByKMAAAAJ)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/bingjinxue)
- [UNH faculty page](https://paulcollege.unh.edu/person/bingjin-xue)
